federation.note: The RDF vocabulary + typed model for bookmarks / read-it-later (the data model for a Linkding→Solid fork). Mints only the two terms schema.org/DC/SKOS lack — book:Bookmark (rooted rdfs:subClassOf core:InformationResource, the gUFO-rebased suite core), book:archived (xsd:boolean), book:notes (markdown). Everything else reuses schema:url, dct:title/description/created/modified and schema:keywords for tags. The w3id.org/jeswr/bookmark# IRIs are the ones the solid-federation-vocab media sector / bookmarks# alignments reference. GitHub-installable now (committed dist/, ignore-scripts=true); npm publish is a deferred migration.
